title: Interference with natural drainage
doc_html:
§1706.  Interference with natural drainage

No drainage district created under this Part shall in its levee construction interfere with the natural drainage of any contiguous territory without making provisions at its expense to furnish equivalent drainage to the contiguous territory.
doc_text:
§1706.  Interference with natural drainage
No drainage district created under this Part shall in its levee construction interfere with the natural drainage of any contiguous territory without making provisions at its expense to furnish equivalent drainage to the contiguous territory.
